description_long: This is a large, three-seater recliner sofa upholstered in dark brown leather, featuring a classic and robust design. The backrest is divided into three distinct, padded sections, each with subtle tufted button detailing that adds a touch of elegance. The armrests are wide, rounded, and heavily cushioned, with decorative woven panels on the lower sides for added visual interest. The seat cushions are thick and plush, providing ample comfort for extended sitting. The base of the recliner is solid and slightly raised on small, rounded wooden feet, giving it a sturdy appearance. The overall finish is smooth and glossy, with a luxurious, high-quality look suitable for upscale urban interiors or public waiting areas.
description: A dark brown, three-seater leather recliner with tufted backrest, plush cushions, and wide padded armrests featuring decorative woven panels.
description_view_0: Front view showing the three padded seat sections, tufted backrest, and wide, cushioned armrests.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the thick armrest, seat depth, and decorative woven panel on the lower side.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the continuous, smooth leather back and the sofa's overall width.
description_view_3: Right side view mirroring the left, with visible armrest padding and woven panel detail.
attribute_armrest_design: The armrests are wide, rounded, and heavily padded, covered in matching dark brown leather with a decorative woven panel on the lower side for added texture.
attribute_backrest_segmentation: The backrest is divided into three distinct, padded sections, each with its own tufted detailing, providing individual support for each seat.
